'''lofanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillised|fibrillised]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillised|fibrillised]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lofanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofanithi|lofanithi]] || [[word:lofaniji|lofaniji]] || [[word:lofanishi|lofanishi]] || [[word:lofaniki|lofaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofanuthuthu|lofanuthuthu]] || [[word:lofanujuju|lofanujuju]] || [[word:lofanushushu|lofanushushu]] || [[word:lofanukuku|lofanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofanuthu|lofanuthu]] || [[word:lofanuju|lofanuju]] || [[word:lofanushu|lofanushu]] || [[word:lofanuku|lofanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofanufthuf|lofanufthuf]] || [[word:lofanufjuf|lofanufjuf]] || [[word:lofanufshuf|lofanufshuf]] || [[word:lofanufkuf|lofanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofanethe|lofanethe]] || [[word:lofaneje|lofaneje]] || [[word:lofaneshe|lofaneshe]] || [[word:lofaneke|lofaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofanothotho|lofanothotho]] || [[word:lofanojojo|lofanojojo]] || [[word:lofanoshosho|lofanoshosho]] || [[word:lofanokoko|lofanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofanotho|lofanotho]] || [[word:lofanojo|lofanojo]] || [[word:lofanosho|lofanosho]] || [[word:lofanoko|lofanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofanofthof|lofanofthof]] || [[word:lofanofjof|lofanofjof]] || [[word:lofanofshof|lofanofshof]] || [[word:lofanofkof|lofanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofanïfthïf|lofanïfthïf]] || [[word:lofanïfjïf|lofanïfjïf]] || [[word:lofanïfshïf|lofanïfshïf]] || [[word:lofanïfkïf|lofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofanïfthïfthïf|lofanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lofanïfjïfjïf|lofanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lofanïfshïfshïf|lofanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lofanïfkïfkïf|lofanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofanïfthïf|lofanïfthïf]] || [[word:lofanïfjïf|lofanïfjïf]] || [[word:lofanïfshïf|lofanïfshïf]] || [[word:lofanïfkïf|lofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofanïfthïf|lofanïfthïf]] || [[word:lofanïfjïf|lofanïfjïf]] || [[word:lofanïfshïf|lofanïfshïf]] || [[word:lofanïfkïf|lofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofanæthæ|lofanæthæ]] || [[word:lofanæjæ|lofanæjæ]] || [[word:lofanæshæ|lofanæshæ]] || [[word:lofanækæ|lofanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofanathatha|lofanathatha]] || [[word:lofanajaja|lofanajaja]] || [[word:lofanashasha|lofanashasha]] || [[word:lofanakaka|lofanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofanatha|lofanatha]] || [[word:lofanaja|lofanaja]] || [[word:lofanasha|lofanasha]] || [[word:lofanaka|lofanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofanafthaf|lofanafthaf]] || [[word:lofanafjaf|lofanafjaf]] || [[word:lofanafshaf|lofanafshaf]] || [[word:lofanafkaf|lofanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lofanasha|lofanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofanshësha|lofanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofanrosha|lofanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofanmusha|lofanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofanyasha|lofanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofankshësha|golofankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofankrosha|golofankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofankmusha|golofankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofankyasha|golofankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lofafanasha|lofafanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofafanshësha|lofafanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofafanrosha|lofafanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofafanmusha|lofafanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofafanyasha|lofafanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofafankshësha|golofafankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofafankrosha|golofafankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofafankmusha|golofafankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofafankyasha|golofafankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lefænasha|lefænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lefænshësha|lefænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lefænrosha|lefænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lefænmusha|lefænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lefænyasha|lefænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golefænkshësha|golefænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golefænkrosha|golefænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golefænkmusha|golefænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golefænkyasha|golefænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lofanasha|lofanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofanshësha|lofanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofanrosha|lofanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofanmusha|lofanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofanyasha|lofanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofankshësha|golofankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofankrosha|golofankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofankmusha|golofankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofankyasha|golofankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
